channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Ebola deaths in eastern Congo rise to 131, WHO voices deep concern

Matched Titles:
- Ebola Risk Is High Inside DR Congo But It’s Not A Pandemic Emergency: WHO
- Ebola fears surge in Congo amid rapid spread of virus's rare type
- Health authorities are racing to contain Ebola in the DRC and Uganda. Here’s what’s making it so challenging
- Ebola Outbreak in Central Africa Could Last Months, W.H.O. Says
- WHO chief concerned over ‘scale and speed’ of Ebola outbreak as Congo reports 134 dead
- In Belgium, health expert readies to fly to DR Congo Ebola zone

- Congo's Ebola responders decry lack of medicine, masks, motorbikes
- Ebola outbreak now responsible for more than 130 deaths in Africa
- Central Africa: Did US aid cuts worsen Ebola outbreak?

- How worrying is the Ebola outbreak?
- Worried And Under-equipped, Ebola-hit East DR Congo Awaits Medical Aid

item.title: China's Xi, Russia's Putin praise ties at Beijing talks; energy in focus

- Putin, Xi to underscore alliance strength after Trump visit
- Putin to meet Xi for key China summit

item.title: Iran claims it coordinated passage of 26 vessels out of Hormuz in 24 hours
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- IRGC navy allows 26 ships to transit Hormuz since Tuesday
- Twenty-six ships cross Strait of Hormuz in past 24 hours — IRGC
- IRGC Says 26 Vessels Passed Through Strait of Hormuz Over Past Day
- IRGC: 26 ships crossed Strait of Hormuz in last 24 hours
- Flash: Iran's IRGC says 26 ships pass through Hormuz Strait in past 24 hrs with coordination of its navy -- statement
- Shipping traffic through Strait of Hormuz rebounds: report]]>

item.title: Heavy rain and floods kill at least 12 in China, force thousands to evacuate
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Heavy Rain and Floods in China Kill at Least 22
- Heavy Rain and Floods in China Kill at Least 22
- Torrential rain and floods batter China, killing at least 12 and forcing mass evacuations
- Torrential rain and floods batter China, killing at least 12 and forcing mass evacuations
- 21 killed as rains drench southern, central China
- Death toll reaches 22 in China rains, 20 more missing
- Torrential rain and floods batter China, killing at least 12 and forcing mass evacuations]]>

item.title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Lithuanian leaders rushed to bunkers as drone violates country’s airspace
- Lithuanians Briefly Head To Bunkers Over Drone Alert
- Lithuanians briefly head to bunkers over drone alert
- Residents of Lithuania's capital told to shelter as drone alarm underlines NATO's eastern jitters
- Video shows Lithuanians sheltering in underground parking during drone alert
- Lithuanian Capital City Suspends Flights Due to Drone Warning
- Lithuanian lawmakers shelter, Vilnius air traffic suspended due to drone incursion
- Residents of Lithuania's capital told to shelter amid drone alarm
- Residents of Lithuania's capital told to shelter as drone alarm underlines NATO's eastern jitters
- Lithuania declares alert over drone approaching from Belarus. Vilnius residents shelter. Airport halts operations for an hour.
- Residents of Lithuania’s capital told to shelter as drone alarm underlines NATO’s eastern jitters
- Lithuania issues air alert after suspected drones approaching from Belarus detected near the border - Europe live]]>

item.title: Ukraine ally Britain eases sanctions on Russian oil as fuel prices surge over Iran conflict
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Ukraine war briefing: Britain to buy diesel and jet fuel made from Russian crude oil
- UK eases sanctions on Russian jet fuel and diesel imports
- UK Eases Sanctions On Russian Jet Fuel And Diesel Imports
- UK eases sanctions on Russian oil refined into jet fuel and diesel
- Fuel-thirsty UK relaxes Russian oil sanctions, leaving Ukrainians ‘very let down’
- UK eases sanctions on Russian oil refined into jet fuel and diesel
- Britain eases sanctions on Russian jet fuel and diesel imports]]>

item.title: How Vladimir Putin’s chance encounter with a Chinese boy in Beijing shaped a life’s path
item.source: South China Morning Post (+8 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Putin’s China visit: Key moments and results in VIDEOS
- On Trump’s Heels, Putin Gets a Lavish Welcome in China but No Blockbuster Deals
- Visa-free travel, porcelain set, oil and gas: highlights of Putin's visit to China
- Putin concludes his visit to China
- Putin, Xi attend TASS-Xinhua photo exhibit on Russia-China relations’ development
- How did Putin and Trump's visits to China compare?
- Putin Leaves Beijing With 42 Deals and Stronger Russia-China Ties
- Putin, Following Trump, Visits the World’s Center Stage]]>

item.title: Israeli lawmakers advance bill to dissolve parliament
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Explainer-Israel's parliament has voted to dissolve itself. What's next?
- Israel takes step toward snap election as Knesset votes to dissolve
- Israeli parliament votes to advance bill to dissolve Knesset, paving way for early elections
- Explainer-Israel's parliament has voted to dissolve itself. What's next?
- Israeli parliament advances bill to dissolve itself
- Israel takes step toward snap election as Knesset votes to dissolve
- Initial vote in Israel brings parliament closer to dissolution
- Israel takes step towards snap election as Parliament votes to dissolve
- How Israel's decision to dissolve parliament might lead to an unexpected election
- Explainer-Israeli vote to dissolve parliament may bring elections forward]]>
